words.def: a language unit by which a person or thing is known
words.zh: n. 名字, 名稱, 姓名, 名義, 名譽, 檔名

words.def: an average of n numbers computed by adding some function of the numbers and dividing by some function of n
words.zh: a. 低劣的, 卑賤的, 簡陋的, 吝嗇的, 慚愧的, 平均的, 中間的, 普通的

words.def: an adult person who is male (as opposed to a woman)
words.zh: n. 男人, 人類, 人
